title: stelis bialaria
intro: Stelis bialaria, also known as the Białystok orchid, is a species of orchid native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Stelis bialaria include its ability to aid in the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health. The herbal preparations of Stelis bialaria typically involve making a tea by infusing the dried roots and flowers in hot water, or using the plant's extracts in capsule or tincture form.
